title: The Repair Verdict
description: The shipwrights deliver devastating news: the Going Merry is too damaged to continue, forcing Luffy toward an impossible captain’s decision.
scene: Across pages 13, 14, 15, 16, this part follows Iceburg, Luffy, Nami, Paulie, Usopp. The shipwrights deliver devastating news: the Going Merry is too damaged to continue, forcing Luffy toward an impossible captain’s decision.

dialogue.speaker: Iceburg
dialogue.text: Wow. Iceburg -san is really popular here.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: So the workers respect him even more.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Want to become a pirate with us?

dialogue.speaker: Paulie
dialogue.text: WH... WH... What did you say!?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: There are plenty of Carpen-ters here.

dialogue.speaker: Kaku
dialogue.text: Hm? Kaku? Where did you go?

dialogue.speaker: Paulie
dialogue.text: I'm a carpenter. I don't lie.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I have tons of money to pay!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: And some remodeling for the rooms, too.

summary: The shipwrights deliver devastating news: the Going Merry is too damaged to continue, forcing Luffy toward an impossible captain’s decision.
